name: Sugared Nuts
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugars and sour cream in a large saucepan.
2. Cook over medium heat, stirring until the sugars melt.
3. Continue cooking without stirring (stirring will cause sugar to crystallize). Let it reach 238°F on a candy thermometer (or until a small amount dropped into cold water forms a soft ball).
4. Remove from heat.
5. Stir gently until all ingredients are evenly coated.
6. Spread mixture on wax paper to cool and dry.
7. Use a fork to separate the nuts.
8. Makes about 3 pounds.
